description: Workflow: search for assets, iterate, apply changes with transactions
text:
Step 1: Use asset_search() to find all assets matching your criteria
Step 2: Review the list and confirm the scope of changes
Step 3: For each asset in the result set:
  a. Begin a transaction with transaction_begin_group('batch edit: {description}')
  b. Apply the change using the appropriate edit tool
  c. End the transaction with transaction_end_group()
Step 4: Verify a sample of edited assets to confirm correctness
